subject: Repeal & replace this Trumpcare sell out in 2018
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
GOP Senator Dean Heller thought he could flip his vote on Obamacare repeal -- and get away with it. Show him just how wrong he is:
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170726-Rapid-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Team,

Weeks ago, Republican Senator Dean Heller announced that he wouldn't support the GOP bill to repeal Obamacare. (And tried to get as much press as he could for it, too!)

But then, a Trump-aligned super PAC started running ads in Nevada pressuring him to vote for the bill. And just this past week, Trump sat next to him at lunch and threatened him, saying, "He wants to remain a senator, doesn't he?"

Yesterday, Heller voted to advance Obamacare repeal, choosing Trump and his billionaire allies over health care for his constituents.

[**Let 's show Dean Heller that he's not going to get away with placing politics ahead of what's right for his state. We just launched new ads calling out Heller's actions on health care -- can we count on you to chip in $1 now to help us hold him and the rest of the Republicans accountable in 2018?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170726-Rapid-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Heller's vote yesterday was a vote to force his constituents to pay more for less care, to drive up premiums by 20 percent, to impose an age tax on older Americans and to strip away coverage for pre-existing conditions.

**With his vote, Heller sealed his fate as another desperate, self-serving Washington politician too interested in helping himself to stand up for the people who elected him.**

Now it's up to us to make sure this vote will be one of his last.

[**Chip in $1 now to help fund our ads highlighting Heller 's disgusting record on health care and all of our efforts to replace the Republican majority in 2018.**](https://secure.dscc. name: The White House
subject: Honoring American Heroes
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ee61cf3a9b2644a4a1f23c7b3c5d571f65f3bc9c0228bdff1f35cd472962b28381e5d7fc8feae361e4074fd3cd02ddfd7b8badf7ca4b5fc9

President Trump continues to devote this week to honoring past, present, and future American Heroes. From our rising leaders, to our most experienced veterans, it is important that we come together to recognize and celebrate those who put our great country and its values before themselves.

-------------

More Jobs for the American People
Yesterday, President Trump and the Office of American Innovation hosted Foxconn at the White House for a technology manufacturing initiative announcement in the East Room. Foxconn will build a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility for the production of LCD panel products in Wisconsin. This incredible initiative will bring thousands of jobs and billions of dollars in investments to America.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ee61cf3a9b2644a4bc7c3da1dee9ed913f105aecdadb47995164c3b008df46ebd96fd2bbd8455c6e472d11c0ec0a6a062bd40fa3af02dc4a
Watch the announcement

President Trump Speaks to American Legion’s Boys Nation and Girls Nation Program Delegates
President Trump welcomed American Legion’s Boys Nation and Girls Nation program delegates from across the country to the White House yesterday. The President commended the young leaders saying, “As I look out at the audience, I see the next generation of American leaders. I see the promise of our future. I see the strength and love of the American spirit. And because of young people like you, I am more confident than ever in the future of the United States.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ee61cf3a9b2644a4256341d724063404329d3ad888c172af78d348cb6f4b6ab94dc41fa0537d22c7dfaa078bf27ff295cfa7032ff4130bff
Watch the video

Why We Need to Repeal Obamacare
Cabinet Members and Senior White House Officials explain why repealing and replacing Obamacare lowers costs and increases options for all Americans.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ee61cf3a9b2644a483013bbd3548e81cebcc81321d5e020a8451b4a2447e6b638b97fcfa5ab0ea1eac7774e25b84076d70f639e86bd380c8
Watch the video

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and the American Legion Boys Nation

| July 26, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce Boghosian)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will award the Public Safety Medal of Valor to two Capitol Police Special Agents and three Alexandria Police Officers who exhibited extraordinary valor above and beyond the call of duty. Last month, in Alexandria, Virginia, a cowardly attacker opened fire on a practice for the Congressional Baseball game. Fortunately, the brave first responders put the lives of their fellow Americans before their own and took down the attacker before any lives were lost.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ee61cf3a9b2644a40d007269e43da78146b3ea9d3acfc81ea5e834dbec9020f68970a631c6e7546094dd35b0225014664e7344d0dc5566fd
Watch live at 3pmEST

The Vice President will deliver remarks to the National Federation of Independent Business in the morning, and participate in a swearing-in ceremony for U.S. Ambassador to Japan William F. Hagerty IV later this afternoon.

Coming Up This Week

Tomorrow, President Trump will continue honoring and celebrating American Heroes Week by traveling to New York to meet with law enforcement on Long Island.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ee61cf3a9b2644a47ddeb815b3c729f2c8fb3a708801be7e511b7f4f9ba453beb87b25a473e13a8576548fff2920052c6b4884299f25e865
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ee61cf3a9b2644a4cc0165a31b86d3fb8a4c0f26c856416ea9d2b11261e561aa6409f6bf01eb22c345d2ad3d1db8538ecee8140d36e03441
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d437a78a1f14c35dfde201d16fb6b13a4ef61fcab5847b8f3ffebdb3da6fea65c54632856a47a054633569989bb99f85cc

name: Tim Kaine
subject: sensitive data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

I was extremely concerned when I learned that President Trump's so-called Commission on Election Integrity had sent letters to all 50 Secretaries of State asking for sensitive voter data, including party affiliation and partial Social Security numbers. There is no reason -- no good reason, anyway -- for a presidential commission to ask for this kind of private information.

President Trump continues to claim that millions of people voted illegally in the 2016 election. As with most claims of voter fraud, there has been absolutely no evidence to prove this. I'm much more worried about Republicans using claims of voter fraud as a pretext for making it even harder for people to vote.

That's why I applaud Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe for standing up for Virginians and telling the Commission he would not turn over their sensitive information.

I wish I could say we don't need to be vigilant about our right to vote. I wish I could say the days of disenfranchisement are over. But the fact is, we must continue to fight to protect Americans' most basic right.

I'm asking you, Derek: Will you join me in calling on the Trump Administration to stop attacking the right to vote? [ https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectthevote/?code=Kaine&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftk-votingcommission%3Frefcode%3D20170726%26amount%3D25 ]

Thanks,

Tim

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please unsubscribe [ http://action.timkaine.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/?Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1375018 ].

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: a dangerous path
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
By moving forward with plans to pass a Trumpcare bill, Senate Republicans are setting our nation down a dangerous path toward higher health care costs for worse coverage, while voting to callously strip away health insurance from millions of people and dealing a major blow to our efforts to combat the heroin, fentanyl, and opioid crisis.
Granite Staters from all walks of life have shared their stories with me about how devastating the various Senate Republican health care bills would be for them and their families, and I will continue to fight to ensure that this bill never becomes law.
**But I can 't do this alone, everyone. [This is going to take each and every one of us giving everything we have. That's why I'm asking you to please put your name down to join me and recommit to fighting for affordable health care.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec0/2a380d31/1ee0affc/fe41ce/2835331308/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/saveourhealthcare/?code=hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_healthcare_ja&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
I hope that before we reach the end of this process my Republican colleagues will turn back from their partisan approach and recognize the need to work together to build on and improve the Affordable Care Act to lower costs and improve care for people across New Hampshire and America.
In order for us to get Washington Republicans to abandon their truly devastating and misguided bills we need you to keep raising your voices loudly and clearly.
[**Please, sign our petition to encourage my Republican colleagues in the Senate to improve our health care system, not strip coverage away from those who need it most.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec0/2a380d31/1ee0affc/fe41ce/2835331308/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/saveourhealthcare/?code=hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_healthcare_ja&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Hello, By moving forward with plans to pass a Trumpcare bill, Senate Republicans are setting our nation down a dangerous path toward higher health care costs for worse coverage, while voting to callously strip away health insurance from millions of people and dealing a major blow to our efforts to combat the heroin, fentanyl, and opioid crisis. Granite Staters from all walks of life have shared their stories with me about how devastating the various Senate Republican health care bills would be for them and their families, and I will continue to fight to ensure that this bill never becomes law. But I can 't do this alone, everyone. "" I hope that before we reach the end of this process my Republican colleagues will turn back from their partisan approach and recognize the need to work together to build on and improve the Affordable Care Act to lower costs and improve care for people across New Hampshire and America. In order for us to get Washington Republicans to abandon their truly devastating and misguided bills we need you to keep raising your voices loudly and clearly. "" Thank you. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ""

name: Tim Kaine
subject: can't lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

My work for Virginians in the Senate has never been more important. Just this week, Senate Republicans took the first step towards dismantling the Affordable Care Act. Make no mistake, this is an unprecedented assault on our health care. By some estimates, repealing the ACA could result in 32 million Americans losing their coverage.

This is a critical time. The next election will determine whether Virginia sends me back to the Senate to defend hard-working Virginians or elects a rubber stamp for the Trump agenda.

In 2012, dark-money groups spent almost $30 million trying to defeat me, and they'll do it again in this election to try to get someone who will work for special interests, not Virginians, in the Senate. We have to raise the resources to not only defend against their attacks, but also to spread our positive message for Virginia.

**[That's why we set our end-of-month fundraising goal at $60,000 -- will you pitch in to help us hit that goal?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=sftfCx6m%2FxPYOX3O0uj0LvbJI1Mi6%2F%2BS)**

The first Republican to announce has pledged to run a "vicious and ruthless" campaign against me, and his platform could have been taken straight from the Trump campaign's website.

**[Will you chip in to send me back to the Senate to defend our values?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=rbA4h%2F2YV2GjkORlE%2BW9FfbJI1Mi6%2F%2BS)**

Thanks,

Tim

| Dear {First Name},
This Saturday, July 29th, marks 100 days until our election in November.
That's why our Republican ticket is getting ready to win.
If you were looking for the right time to get involved, now is it.
Would you join our ticket this Saturday [at one of our 16 campaign offices](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PIU-vcO_MsD3Q9O69ULCwwipuBR6U0L8xpYMd6Yoop-0zlyrvw4i8iu8d6Olrm8ao2hzB2fSo7CoOKKGixcOCC7xTj8LAkXe590fqh9F6_V689ENpGbaUv0BTy3_Kb3sOacZZOcEfxen2i-F4ZbJI58RFEYbepRu3V56TN2Twv2s-n1GoKE9G3umdhnfTn0Zy2P8Vz6QuI=&c=FuZpY_w9ipBQxpCUxDnOiQq2s3Y6SDuRia7BBkrvu1qznq5HcIlSQw==&ch=sqYA0fCfoC2SqSPc-B-JquRlWwux2l-oUBstBOgAYgceZ0G7AumiFg==) (with more on the way) for a day of action, where our dedicated volunteers will help get ready for this fall?
We have a lot of different ways to help, so [please RSVP online for our Super Saturday](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PIU-vcO_MsD3Q9O69ULCwwipuBR6U0L8xpYMd6Yoop-0zlyrvw4i8iu8d6Olrm8dis2j1KAnZiR42bt2i7Lp_bnyiIC5bItnJKHBOYX_CZtY5WHQK5yLgR_qgWtBWGkCw830o5W0-rHLsfV5ChTUM-7QLVVI1k0aXLt4yC1u3y5iRoMbKXKX8R89emKMurBDM4jwq8gPzcUVkw8DRIe9hJwfj7LX_0SPeOtp6SIqwEv3D38Dc0YSioEC4jW2PDr8hM4FvisQB4i_cWvgbXxMw==&c=FuZpY_w9ipBQxpCUxDnOiQq2s3Y6SDuRia7BBkrvu1qznq5HcIlSQw==&ch=sqYA0fCfoC2SqSPc-B-JquRlWwux2l-oUBstBOgAYgceZ0G7AumiFg==) and one of our field organizers will be in touch.

This race is close - polls have it within margin of error \- but our ticket is riding a wave of momentum following Ed Gillespie's resounding win in the first gubernatorial debate held last Saturday.
With the hard work and help of supporters like you, Virginia Republicans will win in 2017.

If you missed Ed's big debate win, [you can watch it online here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PIU-vcO_MsD3Q9O69ULCwwipuBR6U0L8xpYMd6Yoop-0zlyrvw4i8iu8d6Olrm8X9eLngfT6rSAFjgv8qox4Ooa_bjrNjZeie5gSwgFvriIvs11rbHrxgQFNDFQr0kq2vzdHMQ7CxLqOSlLxthwBAXOHqY6dY1gQCytCa_6guA9OB-SXyRsCg==&c=FuZpY_w9ipBQxpCUxDnOiQq2s3Y6SDuRia7BBkrvu1qznq5HcIlSQw==&ch=sqYA0fCfoC2SqSPc-B-JquRlWwux2l-oUBstBOgAYgceZ0G7AumiFg==).
Our ticket has worked tirelessly to lay out policies to create jobs, grow Virginia's economy, and make our Commonwealth the best place in the nation to live, work, and raise a family. Ed laid out some big ideas in the debate, but [we need your help sharing those positive ideas with the 97% of voters who did not watch](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PIU-vcO_MsD3Q9O69ULCwwipuBR6U0L8xpYMd6Yoop-0zlyrvw4i8iu8d6Olrm8dis2j1KAnZiR42bt2i7Lp_bnyiIC5bItnJKHBOYX_CZtY5WHQK5yLgR_qgWtBWGkCw830o5W0-rHLsfV5ChTUM-7QLVVI1k0aXLt4yC1u3y5iRoMbKXKX8R89emKMurBDM4jwq8gPzcUVkw8DRIe9hJwfj7LX_0SPeOtp6SIqwEv3D38Dc0YSioEC4jW2PDr8hM4FvisQB4i_cWvgbXxMw==&c=FuZpY_w9ipBQxpCUxDnOiQq2s3Y6SDuRia7BBkrvu1qznq5HcIlSQw==&ch=sqYA0fCfoC2SqSPc-B-JquRlWwux2l-oUBstBOgAYgceZ0G7AumiFg==).

We need your help sharing this positive vision and getting the word out about why Virginia should elect our entire Republican ticket this November.
Will you [RSVP online right now](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PIU-vcO_MsD3Q9O69ULCwwipuBR6U0L8xpYMd6Yoop-0zlyrvw4i8iu8d6Olrm8dis2j1KAnZiR42bt2i7Lp_bnyiIC5bItnJKHBOYX_CZtY5WHQK5yLgR_qgWtBWGkCw830o5W0-rHLsfV5ChTUM-7QLVVI1k0aXLt4yC1u3y5iRoMbKXKX8R89emKMurBDM4jwq8gPzcUVkw8DRIe9hJwfj7LX_0SPeOtp6SIqwEv3D38Dc0YSioEC4jW2PDr8hM4FvisQB4i_cWvgbXxMw==&c=FuZpY_w9ipBQxpCUxDnOiQq2s3Y6SDuRia7BBkrvu1qznq5HcIlSQw==&ch=sqYA0fCfoC2SqSPc-B-JquRlWwux2l-oUBstBOgAYgceZ0G7AumiFg==) and join us this Saturday? We need your help to win.

Thank you so much for your help.

Sincerely,

[Pitch in $5 now to stop Republicans from getting a 60 seat
supermajority >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2744/7377f838/372a6612/51fb28d6/1176505809/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-messer?refcode=20170727nd&amount=10")** Big news, Peter.

He fought to take money out of our public schools and give it to private companies, and he voted to shut down the government. **And you can bet he 's going to pander to extremists in his party to win the primary.**

The stakes couldn't be higher in this race. _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ called Indiana's Senate race a "pure toss up" and Donald Trump has already encouraged GOP donors to "step up and overwhelm" Democrats like Joe. And it's easy to see why.

Now that Messer's in the race, a nearly-endless war chest will be behind him. **[Pitch in $5 now to help us fight off the onslaught>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2744/7377f838/372a6612/51fb28d6/1176505809/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-messer?refcode=20170727nd&amount=10")**

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: Women are leading the resistance 💁
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64a4/24c69fd9/c1eac03a/189970d0/251574918/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact&source=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact")
---

Peter,

If the resistance has taught us one thing, it's that women get the job done.

Whether it's the Women's March on Washington, or EMILY's List senators holding Trump's cabinet nominees' feet to the fire, or EMILY's List governors and state legislators enacting state laws to protect citizens from the Trump administration, or the over 16,000 women who have told us they are ready to run for office -- it's undeniable that women are leading the resistance.

At EMILY's List, our mission has always been to have the backs of women who get the job done. And with more to do than ever before, I've been checking our records to make sure everyone is pitching in what they can.

Here are our records associated with this email address:
**2017 Donor Status:** Not Active
**[Suggested Action: Donate $3 to elect more women who will resist Trump's policies](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64a4/24c69fd9/c1eac03a/189970d1/251574918/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170726_email_SupporterRecord?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Suggested+Action+Donate+3+to+elect+more+&utm_campaign=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact&source=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact")**
There's never been a more critical time for all of us to do our part -- and at EMILY's List, our contribution to the resistance is electing pro-choice Democratic women who will protect our progress from Trump and the Republicans' attacks.

We're ready to train and plug the 16,000 women who've told us they want to run for office into key races in 2018 alongside the 39 women we've already endorsed this cycle.

Helping these women launch competitive campaigns strong enough to flip seats and fend off billionaire-backed Republicans requires major resources.

And that means we'll need everyone in our community on board, doing what they can to make it happen.

**Are you in? Donate $3 to make sure these women have the critical resources necessary to run strong campaigns that deliver victories:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Pro-Choice-Champs](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64a4/24c69fd9/c1eac03a/189970d2/251574918/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170726_email_SupporterRecord?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectProChoiceCh&utm_campaign=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact&source=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact")**

Thanks,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Operating Officer, EMILY's List

P.S. This community has marched, called Congress, and done so much more in the resistance. **[Electing women who will take our values to the halls of power is part of that fight-- donate $3 to keep it going.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64a4/24c69fd9/c1eac03a/189970d3/251574918/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170726_email_SupporterRecord?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+Electing+women+who+will+take+our+values+&utm_campaign=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact&source=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact")**

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64a4/24c69fd9/c1eac03a/189970cc/251574918/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170726_email_SupporterRecord?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact&source=WQEFE737N_digital_email_20170727_SupporterRecordNonDon_inact")

\---

body:
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec1/2a380d31/1ed30aa7/fe5ee4/786982708/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec1/2a380d31/1ed30aa7/fe5ee4/786982708/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
We have 10 Democratic women running for re-election this cycle. That's nearly half of all women in the Senate.
Elizabeth Warren is up in Massachusetts. Without her, we wouldn't have the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, an agency that holds Wall Street and corporate billionaires accountable.
Claire McCaskill is up in Missouri. Without her, we wouldn't have one of our top supporters of reforms that would extend the Social Security and Medicare promise to future generations.
Tammy Baldwin is up in Wisconsin. Without her, we wouldn't have our first openly LGBTQ Senator and powerful advocate to let children stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26.
When the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee announced the Women's Senate Network to make sure that these women and more stay in the Senate, we knew this community would be all in.
[**Today, we 're asking you to join all of us on Team Maggie and become a 2018 founding donor of the Women's Senate Network. Please, give $3 or more to help us build a community to support Democratic women like Elizabeth, Tammy, and Claire who run for office.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec1/2a380d31/1ed30aa7/fe5ee5/786982708/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193c24iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcyN183MjRXU05SU19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_wsn?refcode=e20170727_724WSNRS_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
We won't mince words: 2018 is going to be a tough year for Democrats. But we also know that Democratic women are some of the most persistent, resilient leaders we have.
That's why the DSCC's Women's Senate Network is ramping up its 2018 efforts to elect smart, tough, and experienced candidates to fight for what's right -- who understand that women are not pre-existing conditions, that we deserve equal pay, and we absolutely need Planned Parenthood and affordable health care for hardworking families.
[**If this sounds like a fight you want to be a part of (and you should!), make a gift of $3 or more to get in on the ground floor and become a founding donor of the Women 's Senate Network.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec1/2a380d31/1ed30aa7/fe5ee5/786982708/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193c24iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcyN183MjRXU05SU19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_wsn?refcode=e20170727_724WSNRS_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you for being part of this. Women across the country thank you too.
-- Team Maggie

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: Urgent! Tell Nissan: stop union-busting!
body:
#
Friends,
After ten years of organizing, thousands of Nissan workers in Mississippi will vote next week in an National Labor Relations Board election on establishing a union. Management has stepped up their Vote No campaign. Join me in sending the CEO of Nissan a message to let the workers decide.
Just a few months ago Senator Bernie Sanders traveled to Mississippi with Our Revolution President Nina Turner, Representative Bennie Thompson, Sierra Club President Aaron Mair and actor Danny Glover to march with the Mississippi Alliance for Fairness at Nissan and automotive workers in their effort to bring a union to the Canton auto plant.
That effort is currently under attack, as workers are reporting widespread anti-union activity despite management's professed support for fair labor standards. In meetings, one-on-one interviews, posters, mandatory video screenings, powerpoints, and more, management has threatened to fire workers or close the plant if its majority African-American workforce elects to unionize and join the United Automobile Workers. Sign our letter to Chairman Carlos Ghosn and demand Nissan end their interference in the upcoming union election.
We've seen these anti-union efforts play out before, like the torpedoed effort to unionize Boeing workers in South Carolina earlier this year. We have to stand up to Nissan and ensure workers have a fair shot at organizing. [Nissan Chairman Carlos Ghosn needs to hear your voice before this critical vote.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afd4/bed43eb/e035202/75ff8410/1770925060/VEsH/ "https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-nissan-anti-union-intimidation-is-unacceptable-2")
****[Send a letter to the Chairman of Nissan](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afd4/bed43eb/e035202/75ff8410/1770925060/VEsE/ "https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-nissan-anti-union-intimidation-is-unacceptable-2")****
The National Labor Relations Board has already found Nissan and a contractor agency at fault for their efforts to intimidate workers, but that hasn't stopped them from trying to stop a union before it can start. Workers already deal with low wages, unreasonable production quotas, and unsafe working conditions. We can't let worker power be diminished to give Nissan executives an even bigger share of the profits.

name: Jane Sanders
subject: Health Care study delivered to Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
#
Friends,
"**I see patients every day who have to make the decision between affording their medications or affording to eat **"- Erica, National Nurses United
Nurses are on the front lines of our health care system. They are exposed to the millions of people who do not have insurance on a daily basis - the men and women who die because they put off preventive care due to lack of funds, the men and women who cut down their treatment or prescription drugs because they cannot afford the copays.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afd7/bed43eb/fa64e8d/75ff85a2/1873967311/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/health-care-research-paper-delivered-to-congress")
With Congress currently focused on health care, the Sanders Institute wanted to broaden the discussion to go beyond insurance coverage to a debate about creating a healthy society, with our citizens as the focus. Leaving millions of people uninsured should not be the only option.
The Sanders Institute and National Nurses United delivered a research paper, titled Medicare For All vs All the Healthcare Each Can Afford, to every Senate and House of Representatives office on Capitol Hill. This report analyzes our current fragmented health care system and suggests a system of health care reflecting the nurses' values of caring, compassion and community. Some facts to consider:
* **28** million Americans are currently uninsured and millions more are underinsured.
* Every piece of legislation currently being debated in Congress **continues to leave millions uninsured and underinsured**.
* The U.S. spends **$9,451 per person** on health care every year. This is nearly two and half times the $3,814 average of other major countries.
* **58% of Americans** support a Medicare for All system.

**[WATCH THE VIDEO AND READ THE REPORT](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afd7/bed43eb/fa64e8d/75ff85a2/1873967311/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/health-care-research-paper-delivered-to-congress")**
The Sanders Institute believes a vital democracy requires an informed electorate, civil discourse and bold thinking. This in-depth report is a step towards those goals on a very important issue in our society.
Thank you for staying engaged,
Jane Sanders
**[SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afd7/bed43eb/fa64e8d/75ff85ad/1873967311/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em170727")**
